intent: Narrow-shell 2BR / 2 baths DISTRIBUTED, kitchen at the rear — 10x14 lot, NO CARPORT. Two parallel front-to-rear columns: left (common bath, standard, master, ensuite) and right (great_room, hall, kitchen). Common bath doors directly into great_room across the column boundary; standard and master each door onto the hall the same way.
must_haves: master ensuite, master's private door is to ensuite
master's second door onto the hall crosses the column boundary
common bath doors directly into great_room, not the hall
standard bedroom's only door is to the hall
kitchen at the rear, reached only via the hall
